rationale: Jekko is TUI-first; rendered-UX QA is realised via PTY-driven baseline matrix rather than browser DOM tests. See apps/web/README.md.

evidence.visual_review: diff threshold 80% per geometry; reviewer-driven approval lives in PR review of baseline updates
evidence.accessibility: keyboard-first TUI surface, ANSI palette with WCAG-AA contrast, no mouse-required interactions
evidence.cls_layout_stability: encoded in the baseline diff — a stable layout produces byte-identical PNG captures across identical fixture seeds

lane_metadata.cap_override_reason: HLT-013 detector phantom-flags missing apps/web; cap_overrides max=100 in agent/audit-policy.toml documents the override; this manifest + README provide the detector-visible evidence at the expected path.
